gigapan.name: The new Sebastopol Skate Park, under construction - wider view (skate_park_03)
gigapan.description:
I took three gigapans of the skate park under construction.  I had to slip the gigapan under the fence, and manipulate it by fingertip through the chain link.  Note the f....d lightening on the right as I tried to adjust lighting on the fly so that hte houses would be properly lit.  I'm starting to think that I may simply decide to dislike sky, and find a nice horizon to top of image color gradient, say 5-10 pixels wide, and clone it for all of my skies.  One issue is that lately the clouds have been spectacular.  But in a 'subtle spectacular' way.  I want to keep those clouds.

Or perhaps it is simply a matter of craft.  Craft is not like sincerity.

"Sincerity is the key to life, once you can fake that you can do anything."


focal length: 133
